cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.interpretation: love, new feelings, emotional awakening, creativity, spirituality, intuition

cards.name: 2 of Cups
cards.interpretation: unity, partnership, attraction, connection, close bonds, joining forces, mutual respect

cards.name: 4 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of support, instability, feeling unwelcome, transience, lack of roots, home conflict
